cases.title: TS-32: Student POST /reports/export returns 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:export or report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Attendance data exists for export-eligible class-subject filters HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode ExportNotAllowed per API design §8.3 and roles-permissions §2.5
Assert Vietnamese message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per BR-09 and AC-13b
Assert response body is not text/csv and contains no attendance data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created with actor studentId per BR-09 outcome and error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: Testing-plan TS-32 satisfied for Student: BR-09 always denies student CSV export with localized permission error and denied attempt logged

cases.title: TS-33: TrainingOfficeAdmin institution-wide CSV export permitted and audit-logged
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:export permission
Closed sessions with mixed attendance exist for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102 in June 2026
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Assert CSV header contains institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at per API design §8.3
POST /api/v1/reports/export with institution-wide filters spanning multiple cohorts within June 2026 and assert HTTP 200 with rows from all filtered cohorts
Query ExportAuditLog and assert success entry with exportedById matching admin actor, filterSummary, and rowCount per domain model §3.12
cases.expected: BR-09 allows TrainingOfficeAdmin institution-wide export within active filters: TS-33 satisfied with UTF-8 CSV download and ExportAuditLog on success

cases.title: ExportService.exportCsv scopes instructor export to ClassAssignment at DB boundary
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101 (assigned) and HESD-02 / SWE-102 (unassigned)
ExportService wired with reporting-export module per domain model §7
Instructor userId with ClassAssignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
steps: Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, instructorId) for assigned pair
Assert CSV buffer returned containing only HESD-01 / SWE-101 rows and ExportAuditLog success entry persisted with exportedById matching instructorId
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from, to }, instructorId) for unassigned pair
Assert BR-09/BR-08 scope guard throws or returns denial before CSV generation for out-of-scope request
Assert no ExportAuditLog success row and ExportDenied security audit for out-of-scope instructor attempt
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv with same assigned filters and TrainingOfficeAdmin userId and assert institution-wide rows within filter scope
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: ExportService enforces BR-09 role scope — instructor succeeds in assigned class-subject only; out-of-scope denied; admin institution-wide within filters

cases.title: Denied export attempt writes ExportDenied security audit with actor and reason
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance data for export filters
ExportService or permission guard configured to log failed export per roles-permissions §2.6
Student userId with role Student
steps: Record security audit / ExportDenied log count before export attempt
Invoke export path with Student userId and valid filter body
Assert BR-09 denial before any CSV rows emitted
Query security audit store for new ExportDenied entry with actor studentId
Assert audit record includes denial reason referencing student role per error-handling §6.2
Assert no ExportAuditLog success entry created for the denied attempt
cases.expected: BR-09 outcome: denied export attempt audit-logged with actor and reason per business rule and NFR-11

cases.title: POST /reports/export returns 403 JSON envelope for Student role
preconditions: Authenticated Student session cookie
Valid export filter body with classCode, subjectCode, from, to
steps: Send POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON filter body and Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert Content-Type application/json (not text/csv)
Assert response body contains errorCode ExportNotAllowed per API design §8.3
Assert response body contains message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu
Assert response body does not contain CSV header row or attendance rows
cases.expected: HTTP 403 contract for POST /reports/export when BR-09 denies Student role; JSON error envelope with ExportNotAllowed

cases.title: POST /reports/export returns 200 with CSV attachment for TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie
Closed session attendance data exists within requested filter range
steps: Send POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } and admin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Assert Content-Disposition attachment; filename="attendance-export-<date>.csv" per API design §8.3
Assert response body is raw CSV text with header row containing institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at per API design §8.3
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for POST /reports/export when BR-09 passes for admin; CSV file stream with spec columns returned to TrainingOfficeAdmin

cases.title: Instructor POST /reports/export for unassigned class-subject denied with no data leak
preconditions: Instructor A assigned only to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read per API design §8.3
Attendance data exists for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary for HESD-01 / SWE-101 using Instructor A session and assert HTTP 200 (assigned report:read allowed)
POST /api/v1/reports/export with body { classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode Forbidden or ExportNotAllowed per BR-08 scope
Assert localized permission error returned; response is not text/csv
Assert no out-of-scope attendance rows in response body
Verify ExportDenied audit log entry with actor instructorAId per BR-09
cases.expected: BR-09 rbac-negative: instructor out-of-scope export denied despite report:read on assigned pairs; denied attempt logged; no cross-assignment data leak

cases.title: Student POST /reports/export rejected with localized message and no peer data leak
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:export or report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Attendance data exists in system for other students in HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode ExportNotAllowed
Assert message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Assert response contains no peer attendance or roster data
Verify ExportDenied security audit entry created per BR-09 and error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: BR-09 rbac-negative: Student role always denied CSV export with localized message; denied attempt logged; no data leak

cases.title: Flow D: Instructor in-scope export 200, out-of-scope 403, admin export 200 with audit
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read
TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated
Closed session with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 and separate data in unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102
steps: Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for assigned HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters and assert HTTP 200 with scoped CSV per AC-13c
Instructor A POST /api/v1/reports/export for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 filters and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden with localized permission error per BR-08
TrainingOfficeAdmin POST /api/v1/reports/export for HESD-01 / SWE-101 filters and assert HTTP 200 with valid CSV
Assert ExportAuditLog written for instructor in-scope success and admin success; ExportDenied for instructor out-of-scope attempt
Confirm Flow D reporting authorization per testing-plan §6 tags BR-08, BR-09, AC-12, AC-13
cases.expected: Flow D export authorization: BR-09 permits instructor in-scope export with audit; out-of-scope denied; admin institution-wide export succeeds with audit

cases.title: Direct API export for instructor out-of-scope class-subject blocked with no CSV payload
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session assigned only to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Known attendance data exists for unassigned HESD-02 / SWE-102 that would be included if scope check were bypassed
No UI interaction — raw HTTP client only
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export directly via HTTP client with body { classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using Instructor credentials
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden before any CSV stream begins
Assert errorCode Forbidden or ExportNotAllowed per BR-08 and BR-09
Assert response body length consistent with JSON error envelope only (no multi-kilobyte CSV leak)
Verify ExportDenied audit entry created proving server-side BR-09 scope enforcement independent of UI guard
cases.expected: BR-09 enforced at API layer: out-of-scope instructor export denied with no CSV data returned; audit records denied attempt

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin completes /admin/export filter, confirm, and institution-wide CSV download
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Closed sessions with attendance across multiple cohorts in June 2026
Admin sidebar shows Xuất CSV navigation per page-list §5.6
steps: Navigate to /admin/export
Set class HESD-01, subject SWE-101, and date range 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 in ReportFilterBar
Verify CsvExportPanel shows Ready state with estimated row count
Click Xuất CSV and confirm export in ConfirmDialog with compliance note per forms-validation §4.7
Wait for browser download and verify success toast Đã tải xuống per ui-states §12
Open downloaded attendance-export CSV and verify required header columns
Verify export action visible only for admin role on /admin/export per listing-pages §10.2 and BR-09
cases.expected: BR-09 allows admin browser journey: filter → confirm → institution-wide CSV download within active filters; /admin/export admin-only in nav

cases.title: Instructor uses inline Xuất CSV on /reports for assigned scope; /admin/export denied
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Closed sessions with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 for June 2026
Instructor sidebar shows Báo cáo (/reports) but omits Xuất CSV nav to /admin/export per roles-permissions §2.3a and listing-pages §10.2
steps: Navigate to /reports and set class HESD-01, subject SWE-101, date range 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 in ReportFilterBar
Verify page header or toolbar displays enabled Xuất CSV button per AC-12d and listing-pages §10
Click Xuất CSV and verify POST /reports/export mirrors active ReportFilterBar state per listing-pages §10.1
Wait for browser download and verify CSV contains only HESD-01 / SWE-101 scoped rows per AC-13c
Navigate directly to /admin/export and verify ForbiddenPage, route guard redirect, or Denied state per page-list §2.2
Verify no CSV download from /admin/export and instructor layout omits /admin/export nav link per BR-14
cases.expected: BR-09 UI scope: instructor exports via inline Xuất CSV on /reports for assigned class-subject; /admin/export route and nav admin-only

cases.title: Permission guard on POST /reports/export evaluates role scope before handler
preconditions: API route wired with permission guard per roles-permissions §2.4 and API design §8.3
Real PostgreSQL with export-eligible attendance data
Test fixtures for Student, assigned Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin AuthSession rows
steps: Dispatch POST /reports/export request context with Student role through permission guard middleware
Assert guard returns 403 ExportNotAllowed without invoking ExportService CSV generation
Dispatch same request with Instructor role and unassigned class-subject filters and assert guard returns 403 before handler
Dispatch request with Instructor role and assigned class-subject filters and assert guard passes via report:read + assignment check
Dispatch request with TrainingOfficeAdmin role and assert guard passes via report:export
Assert only successful requests reach export_audit_logs insert path
cases.expected: Integration boundary: permission guard enforces BR-09 role-scoped export — student denied, instructor in-scope via assignment, admin institution-wide — before domain handler

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin ExportService returns institution-wide rows within active filters only
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with attendance for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-102 in June 2026
Additional sessions in May 2026 outside requested date range
TrainingOfficeAdmin userId available as actor
steps: Invoke ExportService.exportCsv({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 }, adminId)
Assert CSV contains HESD-01 / SWE-101 rows with session_date within June 2026 only
Invoke ExportService.exportCsv with institution-wide filters omitting classCode constraint and spanning June 2026
Assert CSV includes rows from multiple cohorts within filter scope per BR-09 admin institution-wide rule
Assert no rows from May 2026 or outside filter date range appear
Assert ExportAuditLog success entry persisted with exportedById matching admin actor and filterSummary matching each request
cases.expected: BR-09 admin integration: institution-wide export within active filters at DB/module boundary; date and class-subject boundaries respected

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin clicks inline Xuất CSV on /admin/reports without navigating to /admin/export
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Multiple cohorts with Closed sessions in June 2026 date range
Populated institution-wide report after ReportFilterBar applied per AC-13d
steps: Navigate to /admin/reports (not /admin/export)
Set date filter from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 and apply filters matching on-screen report
Verify page header or toolbar displays enabled Xuất CSV button per AC-13d and listing-pages §10
Click Xuất CSV without navigating away from /admin/reports
Verify POST /reports/export request body mirrors active ReportFilterBar state per listing-pages §10.1
Verify CSV file download starts in-browser and URL remains on /admin/reports
Open downloaded CSV and verify rows match institution-wide filter scope within active date range
cases.expected: BR-09 browser journey: admin inline Xuất CSV on /admin/reports downloads institution-wide CSV without /admin/export navigation per AC-13d

cases.title: Student report pages show no Xuất CSV control; export API denied with localized message
preconditions: Authenticated Student on desktop viewport
Student has personal attendance history records
Student routes (/history) lack report:export and report:read per page-list §2 and listing-pages §10
steps: Navigate to /history and verify page toolbar contains no Xuất CSV button per AC-13b and listing-pages §10
Verify student layout nav omits /admin/export and /admin/reports links per BR-09 and page-list
If export API invoked directly from client tooling, verify modal or error displays message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Verify no CSV file download initiated from student UI
Verify network tab shows API 403 ExportNotAllowed matching BR-09 rbac-negative behavior
cases.expected: BR-09 UI authorization: student sees no export control; export denied with localized Vietnamese message per AC-13b

cases.title: POST /reports/export returns 200 CSV for instructor assigned class-subject scope
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 with report:read per API design §8.3
Closed session attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101 within June 2026
steps: Send POST /api/v1/reports/export with JSON body { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } and Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Parse CSV and assert header columns match institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code, session_date, attendance_status, checked_in_at per API design §8.3
Assert all data rows have class_code HESD-01 and subject_code SWE-101 only (BR-08 assignment scope)
Query ExportAuditLog and assert entry with exportedById matching instructorId, filterSummary, and rowCount per AC-13c and domain model §3.12
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for POST /reports/export when BR-09 passes for instructor in assigned class-subject scope; scoped CSV audit-logged per API design §8.3 and AC-13c

cases.title: Successful CSV export writes ExportAuditLog with actor and filter summary
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin authenticated
Closed sessions with attendance in HESD-01 / SWE-101 for June 2026
No prior ExportAuditLog for test actor in filter scope
steps: Record ExportAuditLog row count before export
POST /api/v1/reports/export with filters { classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from: 2026-06-01, to: 2026-06-30 } using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP 200 and capture CSV data row count
Query ExportAuditLog for new entry with exportedById matching TrainingOfficeAdmin actor
Assert filterSummary contains classCode, subjectCode, and date range matching request per domain model §3.12
Assert rowCount matches exported CSV data rows and exportedAt within test window per testing-plan §5 ExportAuditLog suite
cases.expected: Flow C audit: BR-09 successful export audit-logged with actor, filterSummary, and rowCount per FR-13 and NFR-15
